title: Senior Doctor - Ruby Hall Clinic - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Ruby Hall Clinic - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Ruby Hall Clinic, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Doctor for our Ranchi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Ruby Hall Clinic:
Ruby Hall Clinic is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ruby Hall Clinic!
